job_snippets: Design and implement comprehensive security architectures for applications and infrastructure.
Conduct security assessments, vulnerability scans, and penetration testing.
Implement and maintain security controls including firewalls, IDS/IPS, and access controls.
Develop and enforce security policies, standards, and best practices.
Monitor security events and respond to security incidents.
Implement encryption solutions for data at rest and in transit.
Configure and manage identity and access management systems.
Perform security code reviews and implement secure coding practices.
Work with compliance frameworks like SOC 2, ISO 27001, and GDPR.
Implement secure CI/CD pipelines and DevSecOps practices.
Conduct security awareness training and educate development teams.
Manage security tools and technologies including SIEM, EDR, and vulnerability scanners.
Design and implement incident response and disaster recovery plans.
Perform threat modeling and risk assessments for new systems.
Implement network security controls and segmentation strategies.
Work with cloud security services and configure secure cloud architectures.
Monitor and respond to security threats and vulnerabilities.
Document security architectures and maintain security documentation.
Stay current with emerging security threats and implement proactive defenses.
Collaborate with development and operations teams on security initiatives.
